title: Al-Rashid's Repudiation of Yaliya b.'Abdallih's Guarantee of SafeConduct
description: Guarantee of Safe-Conduct Abu al-Khalxab472 has mentioned that Ja'far b. Y4iya b. Khalid transmitted the information to him one night whilst he was engaged in his nocturnal storytelling session, saying: Today, alRashid summoned Yaliya b. 'Abdallah b. Uasan, there being already present with him the judge Abu al -Bakhtari473 and Mul ammad b. al-Hasan the religious lawyer,474 the disciple [$d1 ib I of Abu Yusuf.475 He produced the guarantee of safe-conduct which he had given to Yaltya, and then said to Muhammad b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
